name_cn:
✨Glossy Soft Calfskin Bob Fold-over Tote
Model: 1577
Dimensions: 47.5-39-9.5 cm
The Bob Fold-over Tote is a versatile interpretation of the Bobby shoe collection, featuring a unique cutout handle design. Its modular design allows for multiple carrying styles, serving as a tote, clutch, or crossbody bag. This version is made of glossy soft calfskin.
Shoulder, crossbody, or handheld
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap
Zipper closure
One external zip back pocket, one internal zip pocket
Fabric lining
LOEWE embossed calfskin patch
cm·in
Colour
Black
Metallic colour
Palladium Gold
Main material
Glossy soft calfskin
Strap length
84 - 135 cm
Shoulder strap length
35 - 65 cm
